paper.citation: Law, E.; West, K.; Mandel, M.; Bay, M.; Downie, J. S. (2009). Evaluation of Algorithms Using Games: The Case of Music Tagging. ISMIR 2009.

license_and_terms.csv_access: The City MIRG page publicly hosts the files and asks users to cite the 2009 paper.
license_and_terms.audio_origin: 30-second segments of music from the Magnatune label.
license_and_terms.redistribution_decision: No audio is committed or re-hosted. Official archive parts and only needed extracted clips remain in gitignored ml_data for local research.
license_and_terms.metadata_decision: Only schema/count/hash/provenance and aggregate evaluation results are committed; the downloaded CSVs remain gitignored.

vote_interpretation.meaning: clipN_numvotes counts listeners selecting clip N as the odd item; the other two clips form the human-similar pair.
vote_interpretation.primary_metric: Predict the odd clip as the item opposite the closest representation-space pair.
vote_interpretation.confidence: (winner votes - runner-up votes) / total votes; winner share is also retained.

split.algorithm: weighted Louvain artist communities (resolution 1.0, seed 20260712), exact whole-community 60/20/20 assignment, discard cross-community rows

mirex_evalutron_context.protocol_summary: MIREX AMS used artist-filtered query-by-example lists, about 120 queries, five results, randomized human review, three similarity classes, and an optional continuous 0-10 score.
mirex_evalutron_context.evalutron_citation: Gruzd, A. A.; Downie, J. S.; Jones, M. C.; Lee, J. H. (2007). Evalutron 6000: Collecting Music Relevance Judgments. JCDL 2007.
mirex_evalutron_context.gold_availability: The task protocol is public, but the secured human judgment corpus is not used or claimed as downloadable commercial-track sonic gold.
